description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban winter attire, featuring a long, hooded coat layered over a collared shirt and a visible undershirt. The coat has a tailored fit, with prominent lapels, button details, and is paired with fingerless gloves that add a rugged, streetwise touch. The pants are slim-fitting and tucked into sturdy, lace-up combat boots, suitable for walking on city streets. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, and the facial features are clean-shaven with a neutral expression. The overall appearance suggests a practical yet stylish approach to cold-weather urban fashion. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure stands upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description: An adult male in a long hooded coat, gloves, slim pants, and combat boots, styled for cold urban environments. The figure stands upright with a practical, streetwise appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, layered clothing, fingerless gloves, and the detailed front of the coat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the hood, and the side seam of the coat and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded coat, the straight posture, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, coat side, and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: long hooded coat over layered shirts, slim pants, fingerless gloves, and combat boots
